title: 日本ダービーの後に・あなたの夢の次は

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I did it... I won! I'm the Derby champion!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Mom! Mama! I actually did it!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: That was so inspiring! Thank youuu!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Spe... Congrats. You were incredible, really.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But this isn't the end... I'm gonna beat you next
time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky lost to Special Week, and the crowd's
reaction is as expected.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Special Week sure is something! At this rate, she's
definitely gonna win the next one too!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
That's right, she's the real deal! She'll always be
the favorite to win!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but... I agree with what they're saying. She's
still improving.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Guess that just means I have to get better before
the Kikuka Sho too... Psh, yeah right.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the last race of the Classic Triple Crown on
the horizon, the Umamusume welcome in the
coming summer.
